mapper.sql: case when q.completeness_level is not null then q.completeness_level when sc.score_line is not null and ar.min_admitted_score is not null and ar.max_admitted_score is not null and ar.avg_admitted_score is not null and (ap.total_plan is not null or ap.unified_exam_quota is not null or ar.admitted_count is not null) then 'A' when sc.score_line is not null and (ar.avg_admitted_score is not null or ar.min_admitted_score is not null or ap.total_plan is not null or ap.unified_exam_quota is not null) then 'B' when sc.score_line is not null then 'C' when sc.score_line is null then 'D' else 'D' end

sql.if: and ( s.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.program_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.program_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.research_direction like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: select count(distinct c.id) collegeCount, count(distinct p.id) programCount, count(distinct case when p.is_408 = 1 then p.id end) program408Count, count(distinct case when data.dataCompleteness = 'A' then p.id end) aLevelCount, count(distinct case when data.dataCompleteness = 'B' then p.id end) bLevelCount, count(distinct case when data.dataCompleteness = 'C' then p.id end) cLevelCount, count(distinct case when data.dataCompleteness = 'D' then p.id end) dLevelCount, coalesce(count(distinct st.id), 0) pendingReviewCount, coalesce(count(distinct task.id), 0) missingTaskCount from school s left join college c on c.school_id = s.id left join program p on p.college_id = c.id and p.status = 'active' left join ( select p2.id programId, dataCompleteness from program p2 left join admission_score sc on sc.program_id = p2.id and sc.year = #{year} left join admission_plan ap on ap.program_id = p2.id and ap.year = #{year} left join admission_result ar on ar.program_id = p2.id and ar.year = #{year} left join program_year_data_quality q on q.program_id = p2.id and q.year = #{year} ) data on data.programId = p.id left join staging st on st.matched_program_id = p.id and st.status = 'pending' left join data_collection_task task on task.program_id = p.id and task.status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED', 'STAGING') where s.id = #{schoolId}

select c.id, c.name, c.website, c.graduate_url graduateUrl, count(p.id) programCount, count(distinct case when p.is_408 = 1 then p.id end) program408Count from college c left join program p on p.college_id = c.id and p.status = 'active' where c.school_id = #{schoolId} group by c.id, c.name, c.website, c.graduate_url order by c.name
